# Contributions

Each commit on this branch is an empty attribution commit preserving the
original author, date, and message of a commit on `develop`. Source code
lives only in the single trailing commit. The complete pre-squash history
is preserved on branch `develop-full-commits`.

Original commit hashes, oldest first:

- [`ec6a76164a79`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/ec6a76164a792c734bb9b17c00ce3561c90f8e4a) 2025-06-16 Sayo: fix(ci): resolve autodoc workflow dependency installation failures - Replace Debian container with Ubuntu runner for better compatibility - Use proper GitHub Actions for Node.js, Python, and Bun setup - Fix Node.js version mismatch (20.x -> 23.3.0) to match package.json - Handle git submodule initialization issues in CI with SKIP_POSTINSTALL - Add frozen lockfile flag for reproducible builds - Improve error handling and logging in postinstall script Fixes dependency installation failures in autodoc workflow run #870
- [`a939818d21cb`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/a939818d21cb029c72f31ea43bb205a60ccc5eb5) 2025-06-16 Sayo: Merge pull request #5143 from elizaOS/fix/autodoc-workflow-dependencies
- [`622b7e3c3738`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/622b7e3c3738ce1ba3a893839a584155de942fba) 2025-06-17 Sayo: fix(ci): resolve git authentication issues in autodoc workflow - Remove submodules recursive checkout causing auth failures - Add manual submodule initialization with error handling - Continue workflow execution even if submodules fail to initialize Fixes workflow run #871 git authentication errors
- [`da7a2e07c2bb`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/da7a2e07c2bb23c0913f1657a627857c38ca8d4f) 2025-06-17 Sayo: Merge pull request #5144 from elizaOS/fix/autodoc-git-auth-issues
- [`66e597330133`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/66e59733013381e205b6d5ee79c0f61b02587f9e) 2025-06-17 Sayo: fix(ci): remove npm cache from autodoc workflow Node.js setup ElizaOS uses Bun package manager, not npm, causing cache lookup to fail with 'Dependencies lock file is not found' error. Remove cache: 'npm' parameter to prevent workflow failure.
- [`20e23b88996a`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/20e23b88996a1f572e1c26a51c29db539bb50989) 2025-06-17 Sayo: Merge pull request #5145 from elizaOS/fix/autodoc-npm-cache-issue
- [`ecb5585917b4`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/ecb5585917b4f6ad4f58624660aa060f8d98f592) 2025-06-17 Sayo: fix(ci): remove frozen-lockfile flag from autodoc workflow bun install Lockfile has changes causing --frozen-lockfile to fail with exit code 1. Remove --frozen-lockfile to allow bun to resolve dependencies automatically. Fixes 'lockfile had changes, but lockfile is frozen' error.

- [`ad526fa31988`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/ad526fa319884d929b345df157a6f06b6b9d34a2) 2025-09-26 Sayo: feat(server): auto-install missing plugins in PluginLoader via Bun\n\n- Add PluginInstaller with environment guards and single-attempt tracking\n- On missing import, attempt "bun add <plugin>" then retry import\n- Skip auto-install in CI/test and when disabled via ELIZA_NO_AUTO_INSTALL or ELIZA_NO_PLUGIN_AUTO_INSTALL\n- Update bun.lock to include @elizaos/plugin-anthropic and dependencies\n\nThis improves UX by resolving missing plugin modules on-demand while remaining safe in controlled environments.

- [`1cf81c172df7`](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/commit/1cf81c172df7f17e748fa244f8fd60abc0069581) 2025-09-28 Sayo: fix(server): downgrade plugin import failure from error to warn\n\nWhen dynamic import of a plugin fails, it is often recoverable via auto-installation or optional dependency resolution. Logging at error level creates noisy logs and implies server fault. This change uses warn to indicate a soft failure, while preserving installer retry and fallback behavior.
